description.overview: A Viking-era cattle dog, the Swedish Vallhund looks like a wolf-gray Corgi. They're energetic, intelligent dogs with a fearless attitude.
description.history: The Swedish Vallhund originated in Sweden.
description.temperament: Known for being friendly, energetic, alert.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their medium-length double coat coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: A Viking-era cattle dog, the Swedish Vallhund looks like a wolf-gray Corgi. They're energetic, intelligent dogs with a fearless attitude.
